Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Webinar by Dr. Prakhar Srivastava Go Back Feb, 06 2023 at 10:00 am Online Webinar by Dr. Prakhar Srivastava Dr. Prakhar Srivastava is a postdoctoral research fellow at Pusan National University (South Korea), currently working in the realm of nano-formulated therapies against hospital-acquired drug-resistant pathogens. He completed his under graduation from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan (2009-2013) and postgraduation from SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai (2014-2016). He holds a Doctoral degree from the Vellore Institute of Technology (2016-2021) in the area of infectious microbiology. His research interest revolves around deciphering the novel quorum sensing (QS) mechanism in opportunistic pathogens and their intrinsic interlinked mechanistic behaviour during chronic infections that can serve as a potential therapeutic target. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
